'''鈭歵h-d-r-k''' ('''kathadrekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackroll|jackroll]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackroll|jackroll]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-d-r-k
|-
! Lemma
| kathadrekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadrekoko|thithadrekoko]] || [[word:jithadrekoko|jithadrekoko]] || [[word:shithadrekoko|shithadrekoko]] || [[word:kithadrekoko|kithadrekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadrekoko|thuthuthadrekoko]] || [[word:jujuthadrekoko|jujuthadrekoko]] || [[word:shushuthadrekoko|shushuthadrekoko]] || [[word:kukuthadrekoko|kukuthadrekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadrekoko|thuthadrekoko]] || [[word:juthadrekoko|juthadrekoko]] || [[word:shuthadrekoko|shuthadrekoko]] || [[word:kuthadrekoko|kuthadrekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadrekoko|thuthadrekoko]] || [[word:juthadrekoko|juthadrekoko]] || [[word:shuthadrekoko|shuthadrekoko]] || [[word:kuthadrekoko|kuthadrekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethadrekoko|thethadrekoko]] || [[word:jethadrekoko|jethadrekoko]] || [[word:shethadrekoko|shethadrekoko]] || [[word:kethadrekoko|kethadrekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothadrekoko|thothothadrekoko]] || [[word:jojothadrekoko|jojothadrekoko]] || [[word:shoshothadrekoko|shoshothadrekoko]] || [[word:kokothadrekoko|kokothadrekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadrekoko|thothadrekoko]] || [[word:jothadrekoko|jothadrekoko]] || [[word:shothadrekoko|shothadrekoko]] || [[word:kothadrekoko|kothadrekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadrekoko|thothadrekoko]] || [[word:jothadrekoko|jothadrekoko]] || [[word:shothadrekoko|shothadrekoko]] || [[word:kothadrekoko|kothadrekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thadrekoko|th忙thadrekoko]] || [[word:j忙thadrekoko|j忙thadrekoko]] || [[word:sh忙thadrekoko|sh忙thadrekoko]] || [[word:k忙thadrekoko|k忙thadrekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadrekoko|thathathadrekoko]] || [[word:jajathadrekoko|jajathadrekoko]] || [[word:shashathadrekoko|shashathadrekoko]] || [[word:kakathadrekoko|kakathadrekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadrekoko|thathadrekoko]] || [[word:jathadrekoko|jathadrekoko]] || [[word:shathadrekoko|shathadrekoko]] || [[word:kathadrekoko|kathadrekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadrekoko|thathadrekoko]] || [[word:jathadrekoko|jathadrekoko]] || [[word:shathadrekoko|shathadrekoko]] || [[word:kathadrekoko|kathadrekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
